schema.title: Response Runtime Capabilities Api Capabilities Get
Response List Conversations Api Chat Conversations Get
Response Delete Conversation Api Chat Conversations  Conv Id  Delete

post.description:
Generate an image from inside a chat (the /image bridge). Queues an image
job on the shared arbiter; the worker writes the result back into the
assistant message as markdown so it renders inline.

delete.description: Delete a message and everything after it — used for edit & regenerate.

schema.title: Response Truncate Messages Api Chat Conversations  Conv Id  Messages  Message Id  Delete
Response Get Code File Api Code File Get
Response List Code Files Api Code Files Get
Response Get Downloads Api Downloads Get

post.description: Begin a background download of the selected catalog keys.

schema.title: Response Start Downloads Api Downloads Start Post
Response List Images Api Images Get

get.description: Generation counters for the History header (total / today / per-model).

schema.title: Response Image Stats Api Images Stats Get

post.description:
Accept a source image for img2img/inpainting. We re-encode to PNG via PIL
so the stored file is normalized, and return an opaque token the composer
puts in a job's ``init_image`` param.

schema.title: Response Upload Init Image Api Images Upload Post

post.description:
Accept an inpainting mask. White/bright pixels mark the repaint region;
grey pixels are preserved for feathered edges.

schema.title: Response Upload Mask Image Api Images Upload Mask Post
Response Delete Image Api Images  Image Id  Delete

post.description:
Open the OS file manager with the image file selected. Local-app
convenience — the browser cannot reach the desktop file manager itself.

schema.title: Response Reveal Image Api Images  Image Id  Reveal Post
Response List Jobs Api Jobs Get

post.description: Accept a *batch* of jobs in one call (the core 'throw a batch in' flow).

schema.title: Response Create Jobs Api Jobs Post

post.description:
Queue a multi-turn LLM chat completion. The caller sends the full message
history; the assistant reply streams over the WebSocket as ``llm.token``
events and lands in full on ``job.done`` (field ``text``).

schema.title: Response Clear Finished Api Jobs Clear Post

post.description:
Queue an LLM job that expands a short idea into a rich image prompt.
Tokens stream over the WebSocket as ``llm.token`` events for this job id.

get.description:
Predict how the scheduler will drain the current queue: the model-swap
count and the run sequence. Lets the user trust that a mixed batch swaps once
(ROADMAP P7.4). Uses the same selection rule as the live worker.

schema.title: Response Queue Plan Api Jobs Plan Get
Response Get Llama State Api Llama Get
Response Activate Llama Api Llama Activate Post
Response Check Llama Update Api Llama Check Post

post.description: Start a background download of the latest (or a specific) llama.cpp build.

schema.title: Response Install Llama Api Llama Install Post

post.description: Run the active build's `llama-server --version` health check.

schema.title: Response Verify Llama Api Llama Verify Post
Response Remove Llama Api Llama  Version Id  Delete
Response Get Config Api Llm Config Get
Response Set Config Api Llm Config Post

post.description: Interrupt the LLM that is currently streaming (best-effort).

schema.title: Response Stop Generation Api Llm Stop Post

post.description:
Start a live native voice session. The session pins the GPU, so the
arbiter resident is freed first and the worker parks queued jobs (voice
lane) until the session stops.

schema.title: Response Voice Engine Session Start Api Voice Engine Session Start Post
Response Voice Engine Session Stop Api Voice Engine Session Stop Post
